action_summary.business_reason: Payment for Invoice #INV-2026-03-1147 from Meridian Industrial Supply. Invoice is due 2026-03-28. Paying now avoids a projected 2.5% late fee ($1,206.25). The AI agent identified this invoice during scheduled accounts-payable review.

execution_result.outcome_description: Wire transfer of $48,250.00 USD to Meridian Industrial Supply completed successfully. Funds debited from operating account and submitted to Federal Reserve wire network.

summary: On 2026-03-24 at 14:32:07 UTC, the Finance Operations Agent (AI agent-finance-7721) requested a wire transfer of $48,250.00 USD to Meridian Industrial Supply (account acct-vendor-0042) for Invoice #INV-2026-03-1147. The RIO Risk Evaluation Engine assessed the request as high risk (score 82/100) due to the transaction amount exceeding the $10,000 threshold, autonomous AI origin, and irreversible wire transfer method. Two policies required human authorization: Outbound Payment Authorization (pol-fin-001) and AI-Initiated Financial Action Review (pol-ai-003). Sarah Mitchell (CFO, finance_approver) approved the request at 14:33:42 UTC via mobile biometric authentication (Face ID), with a 5-minute authorization window expiring at 14:38:42 UTC. The RIO Execution Gateway executed the wire transfer at 14:34:01 UTC (19 seconds after approval, 281 seconds before expiration), receiving Federal Reserve confirmation FWT-2026-0324-00847291. The executed action matched the authorized parameters exactly. The RIO Attestation Service sealed the decision chain at 14:34:03 UTC, verifying all 11 integrity checks including hash integrity, signature verification, timestamp ordering, authorization validity, nonce uniqueness, and policy compliance. Total lifecycle duration: 117.5 seconds.
notes: Complete decision chain verified. No deviations detected between authorized and executed parameters. Wire settlement expected by 18:00 UTC on 2026-03-24.
